requirements.task_name: Book a 60-minute stress management session within 7 days under $150 with the highest-rated coach
requirements.task_description: Schedule a single 60-minute coaching session focused on stress management within the next 7 calendar days, with a coach whose price per session is $150 or less, and who has the highest rating among those options.

requirements.task_name: Add the cheapest 4-session career change coaching package under $400 to cart
requirements.task_description: Find coaching packages related to career change, filter for 4-session packages under $400, sort by price, and add the cheapest qualifying package to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Create a reading list with 3 productivity articles (4+ minute read, last 6 months)
requirements.task_description: Find and save three productivity-related blog articles that are at least 4 minutes reading time and published within the last 6 months, then save them into a reading list named "Productivity Sprint".

requirements.task_name: Join a 14-day self-discipline challenge starting in the next 14 days with daily email reminders only
requirements.task_description: Enroll in a 14-day self-discipline challenge that starts within the next 14 days, configure it to send daily email reminders, and ensure SMS or text reminders are turned off.

requirements.task_name: Complete a life balance self-assessment and save the results to your dashboard
requirements.task_description: Locate a life balance self-assessment tool, answer all questions, and save the resulting score or report to the personal dashboard section.

requirements.task_name: Contact a relationship coach with free consultation, rating ≥4.5, and at least 10 reviews
requirements.task_description: Find a relationship-focused coach who offers a free consultation, has an average rating of at least 4.5 stars, and has 10 or more reviews, then send a contact message specifying your preferred time of day and mentioning communication issues.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark two time management posts and one worksheet for working parents (≤10 pages)
requirements.task_description: Find two time management blog posts and one worksheet specifically for working parents, where the worksheet is 10 pages or fewer, then save or bookmark all three resources in your personal area.

requirements.task_name: Build and save a custom coaching plan with 2 individual sessions and 1 group workshop under $300 total
requirements.task_description: Use the custom plan builder to create a plan that includes exactly two individual coaching sessions and one group workshop, with the total displayed cost not exceeding $300, and then save the plan under the name "March Focus".
